name: Colorful Times - Further optimization for performance and efficiency

asi.hypothesis: Apply modern Neovim async patterns for zero-blocking startup
asi.summary: Deferred all blocking I/O (state.load, autocmds, timers, colorscheme) via vim.defer_fn(0)

description: Fix macOS system background detection timing issue with debouncing

asi.hypothesis: Add debouncing and verification delay for macOS defaults command to handle stale cache values after system toggle
changes: Added 100ms cache to avoid rapid repeated checks
Added debounce timer for value changes
Added 100ms delay verification when value changes to handle macOS defaults cache inconsistency

name: Optimizing next_change_at for O(log n) with precomputed boundary table

description: Precompute sorted boundary table for O(log n) next_change_at lookup

asi.hypothesis: Binary search on precomputed boundaries should be faster than linear scan for larger schedules
results: No regression for small schedules (2 entries: 0.014 µs/call unchanged)
asi.complexity: O(log n) vs O(n) for boundary lookup

description: Post-change startup validation - 3 runs stable at ~4.4ms

asi.hypothesis: Validate startup time after code changes

description: Post-change next_change_at validation - 20x faster than original baseline

asi.hypothesis: Validate next_change_at performance after code changes
observations: Total 1000 calls: 10.9 µs vs original 219.7 µs = 20x improvement
O(log n) boundary table optimization confirmed working

description: Complete post-change validation - all optimizations confirmed stable

asi.hypothesis: Validate all optimizations still effective after code changes
validation_summary: next_change_at: O(log n) boundary table working (20x faster)
No regressions detected from code changes

description: Comprehensive performance audit - all metrics within expected ranges

asi.hypothesis: Establish comprehensive baseline for all key operations
asi.assessment: All operations fast. preprocess and get_active are O(n) on schedule size but acceptable for typical schedules (<20 entries). Startup at practical limit (~4.1ms).

description: Update autoresearch documentation - practical limit reached

asi.final_state: Startup: 4.17ms, Runtime: All operations optimized, Tests: 101 passing
